articles.title: COMPROMISES
articles.summary: If slow QA processes and flaky tests are a bottleneck for your engineering team, you need QA Wolf [4].

articles.title: Schedule a demo to learn more
QWEN 2.5 CODER 32B INSTRUCT IS HERE!
articles.summary: The Qwen 2.5 Coder family is a series of language models trained specifically for code. The newest 32B parameter model is better than GPT-4o while being small enough to run locally for many folks. It is on par with Claude Sonnet 3.5 in many benchmarks as well.

articles.title: X PREPARES TO OPEN AI CHATBOT 'GROK' TO FREE USERS
articles.summary: X's AI chatbot Grok, initially available only to paying subscribers, may soon be accessible to everyone.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S FLOOD FORECASTING AI TO REACH 700 MILLION PEOPLE
articles.summary: Google's AI-based flood forecasting is expanding to over 100 countries, covering 700 million people.

articles.title: STDGEN
articles.summary: StdGen is a new method for generating 3D characters from a single image. It decomposes the problem into separable pieces (like hair and jackets) which improves the quality of output.

articles.title: MIXTURE-OF-TRANSFORMERS: A SPARSE AND SCALABLE ARCHITECTURE FOR MULTI-MODAL FOUNDATION MODELS
articles.summary: The Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture introduces a sparse multi-modal transformer that decouples parameters by modality (text, images, and speech), enabling efficient processing while maintaining performance quality. Across multiple evaluations, including the Chameleon 7B and Transfusion settings, MoT achieves comparable or better performance than dense baselines while using significantly fewer computational resources - as low as 37.2% of the FLOPs for speech processing and 47.2% of the wall-clock time for image generation.

articles.title: PROTEIN MODELING WITH MULTIMODAL ALIGNMENT
articles.summary: This study explores how to improve alignment between LLMs and protein-focused geometric deep models for better cross-modal understanding.

articles.title: CALLRAIL'S AI IS HELPING MARKETING AND SALES TEAMS CONVERT MORE LEADS INTO CUSTOMERS.
articles.summary: CallRail's Call Tracking and AI platform just gained three new AI features that combine the power of conversational and generative AI to track and convert leads faster.

articles.title: ALPHAFOLD 3
articles.summary: DeepMind has open sourced the code and weights of AlphaFold 3 for research use. It is a substantial improvement over previous state-of-the-art and could accelerate AI for science applications.

articles.title: CONTINUAL LEARNING WITH ONLINE-LORA
articles.summary: Online-LoRA is a new framework designed to prevent catastrophic forgetting in online continual learning (OCL) by fine-tuning pre-trained Vision Transformers (ViTs) in real time without needing rehearsal buffers.

articles.title: MARKER DETECTION IN DIFFICULT LIGHTING
articles.summary: DeepArUco++ introduces a deep learning-based approach to improve fiducial marker detection under challenging lighting conditions where traditional methods often fail.

articles.title: CAN LLMS FOLLOW THREADS THROUGH NEAR-MILLION-SCALE HAYSTACKS?
articles.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) with expanded context windows enable broader applications. New research across 17 leading LLMs reveals that while many models can effectively handle multiple concurrent information threads, their actual effective context limits are often shorter than their theoretical maximum context lengths. Many models exhibit "thread-safety" (handling multiple information threads simultaneously without performance degradation), though accuracy tends to decline as context windows expand toward their limits.

articles.title: THE CASE FOR TARGETED REGULATION
articles.summary: AI advancements are rapidly improving capabilities in fields like mathematics, coding, and science, increasing both opportunities and risks. Controlled regulation is essential for managing potential misuse in areas like cybersecurity and CBRN. Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy calls for transparency and a careful legislative approach that balances safety with innovation.

articles.title: HERMES 3
articles.summary: Hermes 3, fine-tuned from Llama 3.1, excels in reasoning and creativity. It demonstrates superior performance with models of 8B, 70B, and 405B parameters. The model unlocks new capabilities in AI alignment and artificial consciousness.

articles.title: AI LEADS PYTHON TO TOP LANGUAGE AS THE NUMBER OF GLOBAL DEVELOPERS SURGES
articles.summary: Python has ascended to the top language on GitHub due to a surge in AI and machine learning projects.

articles.title: GOOGLE ACCIDENTALLY LEAKED A PREVIEW OF ITS JARVIS AI THAT CAN TAKE OVER COMPUTERS
articles.summary: Google's new AI prototype, Jarvis, briefly appeared on the Chrome Web Store.

articles.title: AI-POWERED PARENTING IS HERE AND A16Z IS READY TO BACK IT
articles.summary: Andreessen Horowitz is investing in AI-powered "parenting co-pilots" that use LLMs, such as Cradlewise and Nanit.
